stream: domain bytes followed by one encoded projected JSON value
domain_rule: 1..128 lowercase ASCII bytes matching [a-z0-9](?:[a-z0-9.-]*[a-z0-9])?, followed by exactly one terminal NUL byte; no embedded NUL
object_order: ascending lexicographic order of decoded valid-Unicode key UTF-8 bytes
number_semantics: finite IEEE-754 binary64 bits in network byte order; integer and exactly equivalent binary64 spellings are identical; negative zero is preserved, including lexical -0 and -0.0 as the same negative-zero value
string_semantics: decoded valid Unicode encoded as UTF-8
